dev-lens.name: DevLens
dev-lens.description: Quickly inspect page layouts and visualize element boundaries.

stylespy.name: StyleSpy
stylespy.description: Instantly analyze and copy CSS from any webpage element.

speed-boost.name: SpeedBoost
speed-boost.description: Optimizes browser resource usage to accelerate page loading.

json-wizard.name: JSONWizard
json-wizard.description: Formats, validates, and prettifies JSON responses in-browser.

tab-master-pro.name: TabMaster Pro
tab-master-pro.description: Organizes browser tabs into groups and sessions.

viewport-buddy.name: ViewportBuddy
viewport-buddy.description: Simulates various screen resolutions directly within the browser.

markup-notes.name: Markup Notes
markup-notes.description: Enables annotation and notes directly onto webpages for debugging.

grid-guides.name: GridGuides
grid-guides.description: Overlay customizable grids and alignment guides on any webpage.

palette-picker.name: Palette Picker
palette-picker.description: Instantly extracts color palettes from any webpage.

link-checker.name: LinkChecker
link-checker.description: Scans and highlights broken links on any page.

dom-snapshot.name: DOM Snapshot
dom-snapshot.description: Capture and export DOM structures quickly.

console-plus.name: ConsolePlus
console-plus.description: Enhanced developer console with advanced filtering and logging.
